properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He became sin, who knew no sin That we might become His righteousness He humbled himself and carried the cross Love so amazing, love so amazing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus Messiah, name above all names Blessed redeemer, Emmanuel The rescue for sinners, the ransom from Heaven Jesus Messiah, Lord of all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His body the bread, his blood the wine Broken and poured out all for love The whole earth trembled, and the veil was torn Love so amazing, love so amazing, yeah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All our hope is in You, all our hope is in You All the glory to You, God, the light of the world

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus Messiah, Lord of all You're the Lord of all The Lord of all
